prompt: Create a polished anime-style vertical illustration of a young woman seated on a black round stool, viewed from a dramatic low angle with her knees in the foreground and her upper body centered. She has a short bob haircut with white-blonde hair fading into bright pink tips and wears pink over-ear headphones. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque square censor block in a soft beige-to-rose gradient, covering the eyes, nose, and most facial features. She wears an oversized white hoodie with black windbreaker-style sleeves and ribbed black cuffs; the hoodie has one large front pocket and bold pink chest lettering reading DIMES. Her hands rest between her thighs with neat pink-purple nails. Use warm tan skin, glossy highlights on the legs and hands, crisp anime linework, detailed fabric folds, and soft cel-shaded lighting. The background is a minimal sunlit wall with strong diagonal shadows and a narrow vertical architectural edge on the left, giving a modern urban indoor/outdoor feel. Color palette: white, black, pink, peach skin tones, and muted gray shadows. Composition should be portrait 3:4, fashion-editorial anime aesthetic, high detail, clean background, no extra characters, no watermark, no additional text besides the hoodie lettering. Customize the character with white-blonde with pink tips, pink, warm tan, and bright sunlight with sharp diagonal shadows.
